title: J'Dynamic Lighting
description: A light weighted Datapack to lighting when holding torches and lanterns and other fun features
body:
# ✨ J'Dynamic Lighting: Light Up Your Adventure! ✨
Tired of having to constantly place and break torches just to see in a cave?

This datapack allows any held light source to illuminate the area around you, making exploration fluid, fast, and exciting. Never be caught in the dark again!

## J'Dynamic Lighting adds lighting behaviors based on what you hold and carry:

- Handheld Illumination: Simply hold any Torch, Soul Torch, Lantern, or Soul Lantern in your main hand or off-hand to cast a light around you. The light vanishes the moment you switch to another item
  
- Hotbar "Belt" Lighting: Lanterns (the regular type) will automatically illuminate your surroundings just by being in your hotbar. It's as if you've strapped the lantern to your belt for persistent light while you work!
- ![hotbar light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c79c4d6702e97bc0ca290a4ec3444aaf7712f5b_0.webp)
  
- The Power of the Soul: When you hold a Soul Lantern in your hand, in addition to casting light, it grants you the Night Vision effect. See farther and clearer in the darkest of depths!
- ![Night Vision when holding Soul Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6114f43880ad754ffbe7e628fdb2c9bf6538d1c_0.webp)
